   Opus 4.8 is now available! · /model to switch

❯ can you please do the thing where you present me with some options that I can use number keys to select between for a test?
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ☐ Test select

Which option do you want to pick?

❯ 1. Option A
     The first test option
  2. Option B
     The second test option
  3. Option C
     The third test option
  4. Option D
     The fourth test option
  5. Type something.
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  6. Chat about this

Enter to select · ↑/↓ to navigate · Esc to cancel
